data.body:
I have had 7 visits for medical appointments over the past 8 weeks.  Not a fan.

Nothing serious, really. Quarterly primary care doc, quarterly eye doc, yearly eye doc, yearly urologist, cardiologist, followed by a stress test, and an echocardiogram yesterday, because it's been a few years.

data.body:
I hit a turkey vulture on I40 going about 70 miles an hour. 

Its wingspan took up my entire windshield

I heard a car horn and slammed on the brakes, jerked my wheel to the right, and by the grace of God turned onto an access road. 

The 🦖 bird rolled down my hood, and hopped off into the woods.
